original: Several shots impact all around you!
You’re raked by impacts from the gun!
You grab cover before the burst hits you; the only thing you feel is water from where the shots hit, melting the ice encrusting the helipad.
The blast rips into your armor, tearing it apart! It’s Sundered!
The rounds splatter against you like some infernal jelly, smearing across your "+({var0}?{var1}:{var2}.skinFurScales())+" with a sizzling agony!
context: <<POS:00212835>> <<VARS:var0=e.inventory.hasArmor,var1=e.inventory.armor.longName,var2=e>> combatAppend(" The rounds splatter against you like some infernal jelly, smearing across your "+(e.inventory.hasArmor?e.inventory.armor.longName:e.skinFurScales())+" with a sizzling agony!")
